calendar.matters:
DEFAULT JUDGMENT / PROVE UP HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:01am and concluding at 10:25am.

Plaintiff Connected Home Living, Inc. is present represented by Julie E. Bonnel via zoom.
Defendant Home Care for Adults, Inc. not appearing.

There were no witness present as the previous hearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Connected Home Living, Inc., and against Defendant Home Care for Adults, as follows:

Damages: $4,050.00
Prejudgment Interest: $905.42
Attorney Fees: $1000.00
Costs: $1000.00
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $6,955.42

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION AND FOR RELIEF OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE; REQUEST FOR FURTHER HEARING FOR PROVE UP OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Re-Notice Of Request For Reconsideration And For Relief Of Entry Of Dismissal Without Prejudice; Request For Further Hearing For Prove Up Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JULIE BONNEL-ROGERS, Esq. of SAC Attorneys LLP (tel: 408-436-0789) for the Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CONNECTED HOME LIVING, INC.'s Request For Reconsideration And For Relief Of Entry Of Dismissal Without Prejudice; Request For Further Hearing For Prove Up Of Default Judgment.

Matter discussed. The Court instructs counsel contact the clerk for department 505 to obtain a hearing date. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Please contact department 505 and re-calendar the motion before Judge Tong, who issued the dismissal.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:34 am and concluding at 9:44 am

Plaintiiff Connected Home Living Inc. is represented by Julie Bonnel, Esq.
Defendant Home Care for Adults Inc. not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's justification for attorney fees.
Court reviews declaration of counsel re: attorney fees.

The Court continues the matter to allow Plaintiff's counsel to submit a supplemental declaration re: attorney fees.

The Matter is continued to January 24, 2025 at 9:00 am in Dept 505 for additional evidence in support of attorneys fees. (D505)
